description: A classification of governance episodes by the nature of the authorization attempt.

namedIndividuals.description: An episode seeking execution of a data-sharing or data-use agreement.
namedIndividuals.name: Agreement

namedIndividuals.description: An episode seeking allocation of funding or resources.
namedIndividuals.name: Allocation

namedIndividuals.description: An episode seeking adoption of a charter, policy, or governance structure.
namedIndividuals.name: Policy Adoption

namedIndividuals.description: An episode seeking delivery of an analytic product or output.
namedIndividuals.name: Product

title: Governance Episode Type

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.
@id.title: IRI
